brief: The Trump administration appoints a climate science critic to oversee a key federal climate report and cuts endangered species protections, while ICE enforcement actions spark controversy and fatal shootings.
news_summary: Matthew Wielicki, who dismisses climate warnings, will lead the National Climate Assessment; EPA fires a microplastics whistleblower; Missouri declares emergency from floods; ICE shootings in Houston and deportation of a pardoned immigrant draw scrutiny.
papers_summary: HCI papers explore missing data diagnosis, crime linkage analysis, and AI in high-stakes decisions; AI research includes a GPT-5.6 proof of a mathematical conjecture and Boko Haram's use of frontier AI.

en.brief: The Trump administration appoints a climate science critic to oversee a key federal climate report and cuts endangered species protections, while ICE enforcement actions spark controversy and fatal shootings.
en.news_summary: Matthew Wielicki, who dismisses climate warnings, will lead the National Climate Assessment; EPA fires a microplastics whistleblower; Missouri declares emergency from floods; ICE shootings in Houston and deportation of a pardoned immigrant draw scrutiny.
en.papers_summary: HCI papers explore missing data diagnosis, crime linkage analysis, and AI in high-stakes decisions; AI research includes a GPT-5.6 proof of a mathematical conjecture and Boko Haram's use of frontier AI.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦福建鞋厂大火致28人遇难、美国伊朗互相攻击、台风巴威逼近台湾，以及新加坡夫妇涉嫌收养被贩运儿童案件。研究方面暂无中文优先论文，但英文论文涉及脑机接口临床转化、中国画可视化分析等。
zh.news_summary: 福建泉州晋江鞋厂大火导致28人死亡，习近平要求严肃追责；美国伊朗冲突升级，美方打击90个伊朗目标；台风巴威逼近台湾，多数县市停班停课；新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴疑似涉及人口贩运。
zh.papers_summary: 英文论文中，一篇分析中国脑机接口临床试验转化现状，另一篇提出传统中国画构图可视化分析系统CompoVista。
